title: Great Library
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Great Library''' was a [[Library/Legends|library]] on [[Ropagi II]].

==Location==
It was located in the outskirts of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Ebyl]] on the continent [[Forethought]].<ref name="TSK">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref>

==Description==
It was built by the [[Ropagu]] to tell the history of their people and held records from as far back as [[10,000 BBY]]. The records were stored in [[Computer/Legends|computer]] data, but there were a few [[Book/Legends|books]] and scrolls as well. The library was open to everyone, but [[Droid/Legends|droids]] kept an eye on suspicious-looking characters.<ref name="TSK" />

==Personnel==
The library was manned by a few Ropagu, but a most of the business was handled by [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droids]].<ref name="TSK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1998-06-XX -->''[[Alien Encounters]]''
